notes: Regression ratchet prevents silent drops in tracked artifacts, authoritative manifests, authoritative rules, automated/mapped rules, or unsupported-rule ceilings.
Generated candidate checks are fixture-backed scaffolding, not live production asset validation.

Latest pass expands the public DISA corpus in a larger batch with 8 reachable updated STIGs: Windows 10 V3R6, Windows Server 2019 V3R5, RHEL 9 V2R5, Oracle Linux 8 V2R6, Oracle Linux 9 V1R4, Ubuntu 22.04 V2R7, Ubuntu 24.04 V1R2, and Defender Antivirus V2R6. The unsupported-rule ceiling intentionally rises for the added authoritative rules pending automation.
target: unsupported_authoritative_rules == 0 across every authorized DISA STIG artifact
